title: T1 Measurement: Energy Relaxation Time
description: Learn how to measure the energy relaxation time T1 of qubits, understand the physics of spontaneous emission, and master exponential fitting techniques for extracting coherence parameters.
learningObjectives: Explain the physical mechanisms behind T1 relaxation in superconducting qubits
Design and implement T1 measurement pulse sequences
Apply exponential fitting techniques to extract T1 values
Analyze sources of T1 limitation and strategies for improvement
Interpret T1 measurements in the context of quantum error rates
